data.content: Implementation artifact: branch codex/foolery-c6e8-opencode-idle-watchdog pushed to origin at commit d3db9c26bf7ece5d279f5b75a1e355f8d78465fa. Summary: OpenCode HTTP session_idle/session.status idle remains the turn boundary; duplicate turn-ended signals are ignored; post-idle OpenCode events/stderr no longer re-arm the turn watchdog; cleanup watchdogs preserve exitReason=turn_ended; /instance/dispose now reaps the server process; signal-only cleanup after a clean turn is classified as a clean exit for take-loop close handling. Validation: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build all passed.
